creator: brigadir15@gmail.com
text:
Trying to build graphics/drm-current-kmod on FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r355689 with /usr/src updated to r355843:

# cd /usr/ports/graphics/drm-current-kmod
# make build
$ cd /usr/ports/graphics/drm-current-kmod
$ su root -c "make build"
...
--- drm_os_freebsd.o ---
/usr/ports/graphics/drm-current-kmod/work/kms-drm-f9869ff/drivers/gpu/drm/drm_os_freebsd.c:47:3: error: implicit declaration of function 'untimeout' is invalid in C99 [-Werror,-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
                untimeout(clear_debug_func, NULL, reset_debug_log_handle);
                ^
/usr/ports/graphics/drm-current-kmod/work/kms-drm-f9869ff/drivers/gpu/drm/drm_os_freebsd.c:57:28: error: implicit declaration of function 'timeout' is invalid in C99 [-Werror,-Wimplicit-function-declaration]
                reset_debug_log_handle = timeout(clear_debug_func, NULL,
                                         ^
/usr/ports/graphics/drm-current-kmod/work/kms-drm-f9869ff/drivers/gpu/drm/drm_os_freebsd.c:57:26: error: assigning to 'struct callout_handle' from incompatible type 'int'
                reset_debug_log_handle = timeout(clear_debug_func, NULL,
                                       ^ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
3 errors generated.
*** [drm_os_freebsd.o] Error code 1

make[3]: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/drm-current-kmod/work/kms-drm-f9869ff/drm
1 error

make[3]: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/drm-current-kmod/work/kms-drm-f9869ff/drm
*** [all_subdir_drm] Error code 2

make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/drm-current-kmod/work/kms-drm-f9869ff
1 error

make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/drm-current-kmod/work/kms-drm-f9869ff
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/drm-current-kmod
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/graphics/drm-current-kmod

I believe this is caused by r355732[1] which deprecated timeout(9) interfaces.

[1] https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=355732
